wine_experiences.name: Aerovision Sunrise Vineyard Flight
wine_experiences.description: Sunrise hot-air balloon flight over Colmar, the Munster valley and the Kaysersberg vineyards with Aerovision, a long-established Alsace operator, ending with a Cremant landing toast.
wine_experiences.duration: Around 1 to 2 hours aloft, roughly 3 hours total
wine_experiences.group_size: Shared baskets up to 12 passengers; private flights on request
wine_experiences.meeting_point: Colmar, Kaysersberg or Saverne launch field

wine_experiences.name: Fly For You Grand Cru Helicopter Loop
wine_experiences.description: Robinson R44 helicopter flight over Eguisheim, Kaysersberg, Ribeauville and the Haut-Koenigsbourg castle from Colmar-Houssen airport, three-passenger basket with panoramic Vosges view.
wine_experiences.duration: 20 to 40 minutes aloft, roughly 1 to 2 hours total
wine_experiences.group_size: Three passengers per Robinson R44 flight

wine_experiences.name: Wolfberger Cremant Cellar Tour
wine_experiences.description: Cellar tour at Wolfberger's 1902 Eguisheim foudre hall with riddling demonstration, methode traditionnelle Cremant disgorgement walkthrough and a tasting flight of Cremant d'Alsace cuvees.
wine_experiences.price_range: Free for individuals; group tours from EUR 12 per person
wine_experiences.group_size: Walk-in for individuals; groups up to 50 by reservation

wine_experiences.name: Schlumberger Adventure Cellar Visit
wine_experiences.description: Three-hour Adventure visit at Domaines Schlumberger Guebwiller, walking through 140 hectares of single-owner vineyard, the historic cellar and a Kitterle and Kessler Grand Cru flight.
wine_experiences.meeting_point: Domaines Schlumberger cellar, 100 rue Theodore Deck

wine_experiences.name: Domaine Weinbach Clos des Capucins Visit
wine_experiences.address: 25 Route du Vin, 68240 Kaysersberg Vignoble, France
wine_experiences.description: Private tasting at the Demeter-and-Ecocert Domaine Weinbach inside the Clos des Capucins monopole at the foot of the Schlossberg Grand Cru, hosted by Catherine, Eddy and Theo Faller.
wine_experiences.price_range: Private tasting from EUR 50 per person by appointment
wine_experiences.meeting_point: Domaine Weinbach, 25 Route du Vin Kaysersberg

wine_experiences.name: Alsa Cyclo Epicurean E-Bike Ride
wine_experiences.description: Six-hour Epicurean e-bike day with guide Alsa Cyclo Tours from Colmar, riding through the Eguisheim Grand Cru loop with a winstub lunch and a cellar tasting at a Route des Vins producer.

wine_experiences.name: Wine Guru on Wheels Grand Cru E-Bike Day
wine_experiences.neighborhood: Colmar and the Grand Cru villages
wine_experiences.description: Full-day Grand Cru e-bike ride from Colmar with WSET-certified guide, cycling Brand, Hengst and Eichberg sites with winemaker-led tastings at three Grand Cru estates.
wine_experiences.meeting_point: Pick-up Colmar, Breisach or Basel hotels

wine_experiences.name: Trimbach Clos Sainte Hune Cellar Tasting
wine_experiences.description: Private guided tasting in Maison Trimbach's Ribeauville tasting cellar, walking through 13 generations of dry Riesling including the Clos Sainte Hune monopole and Cuvee Frederic Emile.
wine_experiences.price_range: Private tasting by appointment; fees for group programmes
wine_experiences.group_size: Small groups Monday to Friday by appointment
wine_experiences.meeting_point: Maison Trimbach, 15 Route de Bergheim Ribeauville

wine_experiences.name: Distillerie Miclo Eaux-de-Vie Experience
wine_experiences.description: Distillery tour at Miclo Lapoutroie walking through the copper-pot still, fruit fermentation room and barrel hall, ending with a guided flight of single-fruit eaux-de-vie and Welche's whisky.
wine_experiences.price_range: Free shop tasting; guided distillery tour from EUR 10 per person
wine_experiences.group_size: Up to 30 visitors per guided tour

wine_experiences.name: Alsace Verte Balloon Discovery Flight
wine_experiences.address: 60 Rue de la Liberte, 67250 Schoenenbourg, France
wine_experiences.description: Sunrise hot-air balloon discovery flight over Northern Alsace, the Vosges du Nord regional park and the Wissembourg wine villages with Alsace Verte Montgolfieres.
wine_experiences.duration: Around 1 hour aloft, roughly 3 hours total

wine_experiences.name: Marcel Deiss Biodynamic Vineyard Walk
wine_experiences.description: Guided walk through Domaine Marcel Deiss biodynamic field-blend parcels above Bergheim, ending with a tasting of Altenberg, Mambourg and Schoenenbourg co-planted bottlings.
wine_experiences.price_range: Tasting EUR 15 per person; vineyard walk by appointment
wine_experiences.meeting_point: Domaine Marcel Deiss, 15 Route du Vin Bergheim
